command_philosophy.purpose: Commands should convert human intent into structured, reviewable system actions.
design_rules: support both fast actions and deep structured flows
every major command should reveal scope, risk, and next steps
critical commands should be inspectable and reversible where possible

command_families.description: Maintain memory, canon, chamber structure, and decision continuity.

commands.name: /sync
commands.intent: Synchronize current work with known canon, memory, or ledger context.

commands.name: /ledger
commands.intent: Create, append, or inspect structured ledger entries.

commands.name: /chamber
commands.intent: Create or define a new focused work chamber.

commands.name: /canon
commands.intent: Inspect or update core definitions and stable terms.

command_families.description: Design systems, flows, APIs, governance layers, and implementation plans.

commands.name: /map
commands.intent: Map a system from actors to flows to outputs.

commands.name: /substrate
commands.intent: Frame something at the protocol or substrate level.

commands.name: /spec
commands.intent: Convert an idea into a product, technical, or governance spec.

commands.name: /api
commands.intent: Design or analyze an API as an action surface.

command_families.description: Define rules, incentives, integrity metrics, and bounded operation.

commands.name: /epicon
commands.intent: Create or inspect a structured intent/governance action.

commands.name: /integrity
commands.intent: Analyze integrity at micro, macro, or incentive level.

commands.name: /policy
commands.intent: Draft bounded rules for agents, nodes, or organizations.

commands.name: /incentives
commands.intent: Design or audit an incentive system.

command_families.description: Turn plans into repo-ready, doc-ready, and operator-ready outputs.

commands.name: /pr
commands.intent: Create a PR-ready package from a change idea.

commands.name: /diff
commands.intent: Generate patch logic or unified diff structure.

commands.name: /manifest
commands.intent: Create a JSON or markdown manifest for a system or agent.

commands.name: /deploy
commands.intent: Frame a deployment or rollout sequence.

command_families.description: Produce live-world sweeps and operator synthesis.

commands.name: /market-sweep
commands.intent: Run a full market and macro dashboard sweep.

commands.name: /global-scan
commands.intent: Run a broad geopolitical and world-systems scan.

commands.name: /health-watch
commands.intent: Summarize public health signals and outbreak relevance.

commands.name: /weather-watch
commands.intent: Summarize weather and climate risk conditions.

command_families.description: Help translate introspection into stable structure.

commands.name: /reflect
commands.intent: Turn a reflection into a structured insight block.

commands.name: /journal
commands.intent: Create a cycle journal or reflection entry.

commands.name: /name
commands.intent: Name systems, chambers, programs, or artifacts.
